name: Vercel Deployment
description: Configure a Next.js or Node.js project for Vercel deployment. Includes vercel.json, environment variable setup in Vercel dashboard, preview URL configuration, and GitHub integration for automatic deploys.

steps.description: Create vercel.json with framework, buildCommand, outputDirectory, and rewrites
Document all required environment variables for Vercel dashboard setup
Add tests, seeds, docs, and scripts to Vercel ignore
Deploy to Vercel production and verify URL

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Zero-config deploy to Vercel with preview URLs, environment variables, and edge config
